intro: This Product User Manual (PUM) offers guidance on using the Copernicus Urban Atlas (UA) for the 2021 reference year. It provides detailed definitions and specifications for the Urban Atlas, which includes vector layers dedicated to Land Cover and Land Use (LC/LU) mapping in urban areas. The UA covers 38 EEA member countries, the UK, and focuses on semi-automatic image processing of Very High Resolution Earth Observation imagery and Sentinel-2 data. The manual is intended for a wide range of users, from urban planners to policymakers, aiding in environmental monitoring and informed decision-making.
